title: Domino's® Announces Q2 2022 Earnings Webcast

title: Domino's Drone Push Lifts Last-Mile Delivery Fight to New Heights
text: In even the best of labor markets, food delivery has never been the most solid business as far as margins are concerned. Now, as demand for off-premises meals remains elevated post-2020, and as restaurants and delivery services have difficulty finding driver labor, it is even trickier (and more important) for brands to find a solution.

title: Inflation and recession fears are squeezing some industries more than others

title: DP Poland shares jump as pizza operator set to buy Domino's Croatia for £2.4mln
text: Shares in DP Poland PLC (AIM:DPP) jumped after the Polish pizza store operator said it will buy Croatian peer All About Pizza (AAP) for £2.4mln and named a new boss. Nils Gornall, chief executive of AAP, will become CEO of DP Poland when the deal completes.
